How do I sign up for Netflix on a TV? You can open the Netflix app, enter your email or phone number, and follow the activation link to create an account and choose a plan.

How do you sign up for Netflix on an Android device? You can sign up by visiting netflix.com/signup in a mobile browser or starting the process in the Netflix app. Depending on the app version, you may need to complete sign-up in a browser. Then create an account with your email and password, choose a plan, enter a payment method, and finish setup to start streaming.

How do you sign up for Netflix on an iPhone or iPad? You can visit netflix.com/signup in a mobile browser, choose a plan, create an account with your email and password, and enter a payment method. Then download the Netflix app on a supported iOS or iPadOS device and sign in to start streaming. Sign-up is not supported directly through the Netflix iOS app.

How do you sign up for Netflix on a computer? You can visit netflix.com/signup in a browser, choose a plan, create an account with your email and password, and enter a payment method to complete setup and start streaming.

How do you sign up for Netflix on a cable box? You can open the Netflix app on your cable box and follow the on-screen prompts to create an account. Some devices may also allow launching Netflix using a dedicated remote button. If sign-up is not supported on your device, you will need to complete registration through another device or browser and then sign in on the cable box.

What Netflix plans and pricing are available? Netflix offers several subscription plans including Standard with ads, Standard, and Premium. Each plan differs in price, video quality, number of devices, and download options. Users can choose a plan when signing up and change or cancel it at any time, with additional member options depending on the plan.

Can I share my Netflix account with people outside my household? Netflix accounts are intended for people living in the same household. People outside your household need their own account, but in some plans you can add them as extra members for an additional fee. Extra members must be activated in the same country as the account owner and are not available on all plans.

What is a Netflix Household? A Netflix Household is a group of devices connected to the internet at the main location where you watch Netflix. Netflix accounts are intended for use within a single household, and people outside that household must either create their own account or be added as an extra member. Netflix identifies a household based on internet connection, device IDs, and account activity, not GPS location. Users can update their household settings from a TV and manage or sign out of unfamiliar devices through their account settings.

How can I pay for Netflix? Netflix offers several payment methods depending on your region, including credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover), virtual cards in select markets, prepaid cards, Netflix gift cards, PayPal, and billing through partner services such as internet or mobile providers. Payments are charged monthly on the date of subscription, and some payment methods must be enabled for recurring or international transactions.

When is my Netflix billing date and how can I find or change it? Your Netflix billing date is the same day you originally signed up for your account. You can view it by signing in to your account and checking your payment history page. Billing dates may shift slightly due to time zones, and if a month does not include your billing day (such as the 31st), you are billed on the last day of that month. If you want to change your billing date, you must cancel your account and restart it on your preferred date, though you can continue using Netflix until the end of your current billing period.

How does Netflix billing work through Comcast Xfinity? Some customers can add Netflix to their Xfinity bill if it is included in their package or selected during sign-up on an X1 cable box. Billing eligibility is determined by Comcast. Your Netflix billing date is based on when you started your Netflix account and may differ from your Xfinity billing cycle. You can check if Netflix is billed through Xfinity in your Netflix account settings or by contacting your provider. Payment changes, plan changes, cancellations, refunds, and account recovery issues are typically handled through Xfinity rather than directly through Netflix when billing is bundled.

How do I cancel my Netflix subscription? You can cancel Netflix at any time by going to your account’s Manage Membership page and selecting Cancel, then confirming by choosing Finish Cancellation. A confirmation email will be sent once the cancellation is complete. Signing out or deleting the app does not cancel the subscription. After canceling, you can continue using Netflix until the end of your current billing period, unless your account is on hold, in which case it may close immediately. If you signed up through a third-party provider, you may need to cancel through that provider instead. Netflix also allows pausing memberships for a limited time in some cases, and you can restart your account at any time with saved profiles and preferences retained for a period after cancellation.

How do game saves work on Netflix games? Game saves on Netflix are tied to your profile and may be stored either in the cloud or locally on your device, depending on the game. Cloud saves allow you to continue your progress across different devices using the same profile, while games without cloud save support store progress only on the device. If you uninstall a game, clear data, or delete the profile, local saves are permanently lost, and deleting a profile will also remove any associated cloud saves.

What are Netflix mobile games and how do they work? Netflix offers a library of mobile games included with your membership that have no ads, extra fees, or in-app purchases. You can download and play them on supported Android and iOS devices using your Netflix account and profile. Games are saved either through cloud saves or locally on your device, depending on the game. To play, you need an active Netflix membership, a compatible device, internet access for downloads, and enough storage space. Games can be installed through the Netflix app or app stores, and you can continue progress across devices if cloud saves are supported.

How do I use Netflix with a Comcast Xfinity package? Eligible Xfinity customers can include Netflix in their package and link a new or existing Netflix account through their cable box, an activation email, or the Xfinity website. Once linked, billing is handled through the package, and you can manage your Netflix account, plans, and extra members based on your provider’s eligibility. If you cancel your package, your Netflix access may continue using a saved payment method or go on hold if none is available. For issues like incorrect account linking, billing, or login problems, you may need to contact Xfinity support.

How do I use Netflix with a DIRECTV package? You can add Netflix to an eligible DIRECTV package and link your account through an activation email/SMS link or the DIRECTV website. During setup, you can connect an existing Netflix account or create a new one. Once linked, billing is handled through your DIRECTV package, and you can manage your plan and extra members based on provider eligibility. If you cancel or pause your DIRECTV service, your Netflix account may be canceled or put on hold unless another payment method is available. For issues like billing, login problems, or incorrect account linking, you may need to contact DIRECTV support.

How do I use Netflix with a Dish package? You can add Netflix to an eligible Dish package and link your account through an activation email/SMS, the Dish website, or directly from your Dish receiver. During setup, you can connect an existing Netflix account or create a new one. Once linked, billing is handled through your Dish package, and you can manage your plan and extra members depending on provider eligibility. If you cancel your Dish service, your Netflix account may continue with another payment method or go on hold if none is available. For issues like billing, login problems, or incorrect account linking, you may need to contact Dish support.

How do I use Netflix with a Frontier package? You can add Netflix to an eligible Frontier package and activate it using an email link or through your Frontier account page. During setup, you can link an existing Netflix account or create a new one. Once linked, billing is handled through your Frontier package, and you can manage your plan and extra members depending on provider eligibility. If you cancel your Frontier service, your Netflix account may continue with another payment method or go on hold if none is available. For issues like billing, login problems, or incorrect account linking, you may need to contact Frontier support.

How do I use Netflix with a Verizon package? You can add Netflix to an eligible Verizon package and then activate it by linking your new or existing Netflix account through an activation link sent via email or text.

How do I activate Netflix through a Verizon package? After signing up, use the activation link sent by Verizon to go to Netflix.com and either link an existing account or create a new one. If you didn’t receive the link, follow the steps on the Verizon support site.

What should I do if I didn’t receive my Verizon Netflix activation link? If you cannot find the activation email or text, follow the instructions on the Verizon support website to complete activation.

What happens if I linked the wrong Netflix account to my Verizon package? You need to contact customer service and provide the incorrect account email so they can help you link the correct Netflix account.

Do Apple-billed customers need to take extra steps after linking a Verizon package? Yes, customers billed through Apple must cancel their Apple subscription after linking or they will continue to be charged by Apple.
How can I check if Netflix is included in my Verizon package? You need to contact Verizon directly to confirm whether Netflix is included or added to your package.

What happens to my Netflix account if I cancel my Verizon package? If canceled, you can continue streaming using any remaining credit balance, switch to another payment method if available, or your account will go on hold until a new payment method is added.

How do I change my Netflix plan with a Verizon package? You can check eligibility and change your plan from your Netflix account page if allowed by your provider. Changes take effect immediately, and pricing is determined by Verizon.

Are extra members supported with a Verizon Netflix package? Yes, extra members are supported if your Netflix plan allows it. Existing extra members can remain if the plan supports them, otherwise they will be removed after linking.
What happens to extra members when switching to a Verizon package? If your new plan supports the same number of extra members, they remain. If not, all extra members are removed and notified.
What happens to my Netflix gift card or promotional balance when I link to Verizon? Your balance stays on your account and will be used if you cancel the package or make additional purchases.

Why am I still being charged on my previous payment method after linking Verizon? This may happen if you haven’t linked your account, linked the wrong account, created a duplicate account, or still have extra member charges. Apple-billed users must also cancel through Apple.

What should I do if I have trouble signing in to Netflix after linking Verizon? Use Netflix login help if you forgot credentials, check your account email in settings, or recover your account through your Verizon account if needed.

Why was my Netflix account canceled when using Verizon? Your account may be canceled if you cancel or pause your Verizon package, if the Netflix add-on is removed, or if Verizon fails to process payment.
How do I cancel Netflix through Verizon? You must contact Verizon customer support to cancel either your package or Netflix subscription.
How do I contact Verizon customer support for Netflix issues? You can visit Verizon’s support website or call their customer service number to get help with your Netflix package.

How do I use Netflix with an Optimum package? A Netflix membership can be added to eligible Optimum packages. After signing up, you must activate it by linking your Netflix account through Optimum’s website, an activation link, or a Netflix activation link.

How do I activate Netflix with an Optimum package? You can activate Netflix by signing in to optimum.net and selecting Activate next to Netflix, using an Optimum email/SMS activation link, or using a Netflix activation link to link or create a Netflix account.
What should I do if I didn’t receive my Optimum Netflix activation link? If you did not receive the email or SMS activation link, contact Optimum support for help accessing or resending it.
How do I activate Netflix from the Optimum website? Sign in to your Optimum account at optimum.net, select Activate next to Netflix, then choose Complete setup to link or create your Netflix account.

What happens if I accidentally linked the wrong Netflix account to Optimum? You should contact customer service and provide the email of the incorrectly linked account so Optimum can help you link the correct Netflix account.
How do I check if Netflix is included in my Optimum package? You need to contact Optimum directly to confirm whether Netflix is included or added to your package.

What happens to my Netflix account if I cancel my Optimum package? You may continue streaming using any remaining credit balance, switch to another payment method if available, or your account may go on hold if no valid payment method exists.

How do I change my Netflix plan with an Optimum package? You can check eligibility at netflix.com/account and change plans if allowed by Optimum. Changes take effect immediately and pricing is determined by your provider.

Are extra members supported with an Optimum Netflix package? Yes, extra members are supported if your Netflix plan allows it, but they may be removed if your new provider-based plan does not support the same number of slots.
What happens to extra members when linking Netflix to an Optimum package? If your new plan supports fewer extra member slots, all excess extra members are removed and notified by email.
What happens to my Netflix gift card or promotional balance with Optimum? Your gift or credit balance remains on your account and will be used after package cancellation or for future purchases.

Why am I still being charged after linking Netflix to Optimum? This may happen if you haven’t completed linking, linked the wrong account, created a duplicate account, or still have extra member charges. Apple-billed users must cancel through Apple separately.

What should I do if I can’t sign in to Netflix after Optimum activation? Use netflix.com/loginhelp, check your account email in settings, or use Optimum’s account recovery tools to locate or fix your Netflix login.
Why was my Netflix account canceled when using Optimum? It may be canceled if your Optimum package is canceled or paused, if the Netflix add-on is removed, or if Optimum fails to process payment.
How do I cancel Netflix through Optimum? You must contact Optimum customer support to cancel either your package or Netflix subscription.
How do I contact Optimum customer support for Netflix issues? You can call Optimum at 877-694-9474 and mention that your issue relates to Netflix through your Optimum package.

How do I use Netflix with a T-Mobile package? Customers can get Netflix included with eligible T-Mobile plans or add it as a package add-on, then activate it by linking a Netflix account through the T-Life app or T-Mobile website.

How do I activate Netflix with a T-Mobile package (Netflix On Us)? Open the T-Life app, go to Manage > See plans > Manage add-ons, select Netflix under Services, accept terms, then choose Go to Netflix and link or create a Netflix account.

How do I activate Netflix from the T-Mobile website? Sign in to t-mobile.com, go to Manage Add-ons, select a Netflix plan under Line-Level Services, accept terms, then follow the prompt to activate and link your Netflix account.

How do I activate a T-Mobile Netflix add-on for someone else? The account owner or recipient will receive an SMS activation link, sign in to T-Mobile, select the Netflix add-on, accept terms, and complete activation by linking or creating a Netflix account.
What should I do if I didn’t receive my T-Mobile Netflix activation link? If you didn’t receive the SMS activation link, contact T-Mobile support to have it resent.
What happens if I accidentally linked the wrong Netflix account with T-Mobile? You should contact customer service and provide the email of the incorrectly linked account so they can help correct it.
How do I check if Netflix is included in my T-Mobile package? You need to contact T-Mobile to confirm whether Netflix is included or added to your plan.

What happens to my Netflix account if I cancel my T-Mobile package? Depending on your account, you may continue streaming using a credit balance, be charged through another payment method on file, or have your account placed on hold until a new payment method is added.

How do I change my Netflix plan with a T-Mobile package? You can check eligibility at netflix.com/account. Plan changes may take effect immediately, but eligibility and available plans depend on T-Mobile.
Can I downgrade my Netflix plan with T-Mobile? No, you cannot downgrade below the plan included in your T-Mobile package.

Are extra members supported with a T-Mobile Netflix package? No, extra members are not supported with T-Mobile Netflix packages or add-ons. Existing extra members are canceled when the package is activated.
What happens to extra members when linking Netflix to T-Mobile? Any extra members are immediately canceled when the Netflix package is activated, and they are notified by email.
What happens to my Netflix gift card or promotional balance with T-Mobile? Your gift or credit balance remains on your Netflix account and will be used for future charges if applicable.

Why am I still being charged after linking Netflix to T-Mobile? This may happen if you didn’t complete activation, linked the wrong account, created a duplicate account, or still have extra member charges. Apple-billed users must cancel through Apple separately.

What should I do if I can’t sign in to Netflix after T-Mobile activation? Use netflix.com/loginhelp, verify your account email, or use T-Mobile’s account recovery tools to find or restore your Netflix login.

Why was my Netflix account canceled with T-Mobile? Your account may be canceled if your T-Mobile package is canceled or paused, if the Netflix add-on is removed, or if payment is not received from T-Mobile.
How do I cancel Netflix through T-Mobile? You must contact T-Mobile customer support to cancel either your package or Netflix subscription.
How do I contact T-Mobile customer support for Netflix issues? You can call T-Mobile at 1-800-937-8997 for help with Netflix included in your T-Mobile package.
What happens if I switch from T-Mobile ONE to Magenta or MagentaPlus? Your Netflix account is not affected and remains linked to your T-Mobile plan.

How do I use Netflix with Cox billing? Eligible Cox customers can add Netflix to their Cox bill by signing up or rejoining Netflix through a Cox Contour cable box, with billing eligibility determined by Cox.

How do I set up Netflix through Cox Contour? You can sign up or rejoin Netflix on your Cox Contour cable box by following the setup instructions in the Netflix app and linking your account for Cox billing.
How do I check if Netflix is billed through Cox? Check the Membership section on your Netflix Account page, or contact Cox directly to confirm whether Netflix is included in your bill.
Why is my Netflix billing date different from my Cox billing date? Your Netflix billing date is based on when you signed up or your selected billing date and may not match your Cox billing cycle.
How can I view my Netflix billing information if I use Cox? Sign in to your Netflix account to view your payment history and current billing period.
How do I change my payment method for Netflix billed through Cox? Go to the Manage payment info page in your Netflix account, enter a new payment method, and save it.
How do I change my Netflix plan with Cox billing? You can change your Netflix plan anytime through your account settings if you can access your account.
What should I do if I can’t sign in to Netflix with Cox billing? Use netflix.com/loginhelp or check your account email through the Cox Contour app or Netflix account settings to recover access.
How do I find my Netflix account email on Cox Contour? Open the Netflix app on your Cox Contour cable box, select Get Help, and view your account email information.
How do I find my Netflix account email on mobile or browser? Go to your Netflix Account, select Security, and view or update your email address.

What should I do if I see an unauthorized Netflix charge on my Cox bill? Contact Cox customer support, since Netflix cannot issue refunds for third-party billing and Cox must investigate or cancel the charge.
Why was my Netflix account canceled with Cox billing? It may be canceled if payment fails, the account is canceled by someone with access, or Cox terminates billing; you should contact Cox to verify.
How do I cancel Netflix if I’m billed through Cox? You can cancel Netflix at any time, but if you can’t access your account, you should contact Cox support for assistance.
How do I contact Cox customer support for Netflix billing? You can contact Cox through their official support website for help with billing, cancellation, or account issues.
What are Netflix gift cards? Netflix gift cards are prepaid cards that can be used to pay for a Netflix subscription or given as gifts, and they can be purchased at various retail stores and online.
Do Netflix gift cards expire? No, Netflix gift cards do not expire.
Can Netflix gift cards be refunded or reloaded? No, Netflix gift cards are non-refundable and cannot be reloaded once purchased.
What can Netflix gift cards be used for? Netflix gift cards can only be used for Netflix streaming subscriptions and cannot be used for other Netflix services like Shop or Netflix House.
Where can I buy Netflix gift cards? You can buy Netflix gift cards at participating retail locations or online via netflix.com/gift-cards.

How do I redeem a Netflix gift card (existing members)? Go to netflix.com/redeem, enter the code from your card or email, sign in to your account, and the balance will be added to your account for future payments.
How do I find my Netflix gift card code? The code is found under the scratch-off area on the back of the physical card, in the email for digital cards, or on your purchase receipt.

How do I redeem a Netflix gift card (new members)? Go to netflix.com/redeem, enter the code, create or sign in to an account, choose a plan, optionally add a payment method, and start your membership.
Can I redeem multiple Netflix gift cards? Yes, you can redeem multiple gift cards and the balances will be added together and used in the order they were redeemed.
How do I check my Netflix gift card balance? Go to netflix.com/redeem and enter your gift card code to view the remaining balance.
What happens when my Netflix gift card balance runs out? Netflix will notify you before the balance ends, and you will need to add another gift card or payment method to continue watching.
Can I use a Netflix gift card from another country? Yes, but only if the gift card currency matches your Netflix billing currency.
Why is my Netflix gift card balance end date estimated? The end date is estimated because plan changes, taxes, or fees can affect how quickly the balance is used.
Can I use Netflix gift cards with third-party billing? You can use gift cards with most payment methods, but not if you are billed through Apple or have a Netflix-included package.
What should I do if I have a Netflix gift card but pay through Apple? You must cancel your Netflix subscription through Apple, wait for it to end, then restart Netflix using the gift card.
Can I use a Netflix gift card with a provider package? If you have a Netflix-included package or add-on, you must wait until your account is no longer linked before using a gift card.
What happens if I cancel Netflix with a gift card balance? You can continue watching Netflix until the gift card balance runs out even after cancellation.
How do I release a Netflix account hold using a gift card? Redeem a gift card on your account, and the hold will usually be removed within about 60 minutes.
What should I do if I can’t redeem my Netflix gift card? If you have issues redeeming or the card is damaged, you should contact Netflix support for assistance.

What should I do if I can't redeem a Netflix gift card? If you can't redeem a Netflix gift card, check the specific error message and follow the recommended troubleshooting steps such as verifying the code, waiting 24 hours, clearing cookies, or contacting support.

What does 'The code you entered has already been used' mean on Netflix gift cards? It means the gift card has already been redeemed on another account. Check your payment history or membership page, and contact support if the balance is not visible.
What should I do if my Netflix gift card code is already used? Check if the balance was added to your account. If not, contact Netflix support for assistance.
What does 'The code entered is not valid' mean for Netflix gift cards? It usually means the code was entered incorrectly or the card has not been activated by the retailer yet.

What should I do if my Netflix gift card code is invalid? Double-check the code and try again, or wait up to 24 hours if the card may not have been activated yet. Contact support if the issue continues.
What does 'An error occurred during gift redemption' mean? It typically indicates a temporary issue or an unactivated card. Clearing cookies and retrying may help.

How do I fix Netflix gift card redemption errors? Clear cookies at netflix.com/clearcookies, sign back in, and try redeeming again at netflix.com/redeem. Wait 24 hours if the card may not be activated.
What does 'gift cards cannot be used with your current payment method' mean? It means gift cards are not allowed with Apple billing or Netflix-included provider packages.

What should I do if my Netflix gift card can't be used with my account? If billed through Apple, cancel and restart Netflix. If using a provider package, wait until it is unlinked or use another account.
What does 'unable to process your request' mean when redeeming a Netflix gift card? It is usually a temporary issue or unactivated card. Clearing cookies and retrying after 24 hours may resolve it.
What does 'gift code does not match the country' mean on Netflix gift cards? It means the gift card currency does not match your Netflix billing country and cannot be redeemed.
What should I do if my Netflix gift card country does not match? Ensure the gift card matches your billing currency or contact support if you believe it is an error.
What should I do if my Netflix gift card is damaged or unreadable? Contact Netflix support for help redeeming or replacing the damaged code.
What does 'maximum gift balance reached' mean on Netflix? It means your account has reached the maximum allowed gift card balance and cannot accept additional credits.

What does 'gift and promo codes can't be applied to extra member accounts' mean? It means gift cards cannot be used on accounts where Netflix is paid for by someone else. You may need your own account.
What does 'gift credits can't be used on your current plan' mean? It means your current plan does not allow gift card redemption.
How do I fix Netflix gift credit not allowed on my plan? Change your plan at netflix.com/account or cancel and restart your membership, then try redeeming the gift card again.
When should I contact Netflix support for gift card issues? Contact support if your code was used but no balance appears, the card is damaged, or errors persist after troubleshooting steps.
What is the Netflix ad-supported experience? The ad-supported experience is a lower-cost Netflix plan that includes commercial breaks in most TV shows and movies.
Do all Netflix shows and movies have ads in the ad-supported plan? No, most titles are available, but some are unavailable due to licensing restrictions and are marked with a lock icon.
How many ads do you see on Netflix ad-supported plans? You typically see a few short ads per hour, usually placed during natural breaks in content.
When do ads appear on Netflix? Ads can appear before and during TV shows and movies, though some movies only include ads before playback starts.
Can I skip ads on Netflix? No, you cannot skip or fast-forward ads, but you can pause them.
How are ads displayed during playback on Netflix? Ads are shown during breaks indicated on the progress bar, and the number of ads is displayed before they begin.
Can I report ads on Netflix? Yes, on supported devices like iPhone, iPad, Apple TV, web browsers, and Windows apps, you can provide feedback or report issues with ads.
How does Netflix choose which ads to show? Ads may be based on what you watch, your general location, and optionally your activity on third-party websites if behavioral ads are enabled.
What is behavioral advertising on Netflix? Behavioral advertising uses your Netflix activity and third-party browsing data (if enabled) to personalize ads, though you can opt out of this.
What data does Netflix collect for ads? Netflix collects basic demographic data like age and gender, plus general location based on IP address, to help personalize ads.
Are ads shown on Kids profiles on Netflix? No, ads are not shown on Kids profiles.
Are ads shown in Netflix games? No, ads are not currently shown in Netflix games.
Do live events on Netflix have ads? Live events may include commercial breaks across all plans, including ad-free plans.
Can I skip ads during live events on Netflix? No, skip and fast-forward are not available during ads in live events.
Do ad-free Netflix plans ever show ads? Ad-free plans do not show ads in shows or movies, but live events or special features may still include commercial content.
Can ads continue after a live Netflix event ends? Sometimes short ads may appear briefly after a live event, but they can usually be fast-forwarded afterward.
Are ad-supported Netflix plans available everywhere? No, ad-supported plans are not available in all regions and depend on local availability and device compatibility.
Can all devices use Netflix ad-supported plans? No, some older devices may not support ad-supported plans if the Netflix app cannot be updated.
What does the lock icon on Netflix mean? A lock icon on Netflix indicates either a profile protected by a PIN or a TV show or movie that is not available on your current plan.
Why is there a lock icon on a Netflix profile? A lock icon on a profile means it is protected by a Profile Lock PIN and requires a 4-digit code to access.
How do I unlock a Netflix profile with a lock icon? You must enter the 4-digit Profile Lock PIN to access a locked profile.
What is Netflix Profile Lock? Profile Lock is a parental control feature that lets you protect a profile with a PIN to restrict access.
Why is a Netflix show or movie showing a lock icon? A lock icon on a title usually means it is not available on your current plan, often due to licensing restrictions.
Why are some Netflix titles locked on an ad-supported plan? Some titles are unavailable on ad-supported plans due to licensing restrictions and are marked with a lock icon.
Where do locked titles appear on Netflix? Locked titles may appear in Top 10 rows, search results, title pages, My List, and the Continue Watching row.
How can I watch locked Netflix titles? You can access locked titles by switching to a plan that includes the full catalog in your country, usually an ad-free plan.
Why do Netflix Kids profiles show lock icons on some titles? Kids profiles may show a lock icon if a title is unavailable on an ad-supported plan, requiring an adult profile to change plans.
How do I remove locks on Netflix content? To remove content locks, you need to switch to a different plan or adjust profile restrictions such as PIN settings.
What should I do if I see a lock on My List or Continue Watching? The title is unavailable on your current plan, so you will need to upgrade or switch plans to watch it.
How do I download Netflix titles to watch offline? You can download TV shows and movies from the Netflix app on supported devices and watch them offline anytime.
Which devices support Netflix downloads? Downloads are available on Android phones and tablets, iPhones and iPads, Amazon Fire tablets, and Chromebooks with the Google Play Store installed.
How do I find downloadable titles on Netflix? Look for the Downloads icon or use the 'See What You Can Download' or 'Find More to Download' options in the Netflix app.
Why can’t I download some Netflix shows or movies? Not all titles are available for download due to licensing restrictions.
How do I download a movie on Netflix? Open the Netflix app, find the movie, and tap Download to save it for offline viewing.
How do I download a TV show on Netflix? You can tap the download button next to an episode or select Download Season to download all episodes at once.
Should I use Wi-Fi to download Netflix content? Yes, it is recommended to use Wi-Fi to avoid using mobile data.
How many Netflix downloads can I have at once? Ad-free plans allow up to 100 active downloads per device, depending on your plan’s device limits.
How many downloads are allowed on ad-supported Netflix plans? Ad-supported plans allow up to 15 total downloads per device per calendar month.
What happens to downloads if I cancel Netflix? Downloads are deleted when your account is canceled, and you must download them again if you restart your membership.
How do I watch downloaded Netflix titles offline? Open the Netflix app, go to Downloads, and select Play on the title you want to watch.
Do I need internet to watch downloaded Netflix content? No, but you must stay signed in to your Netflix account to access downloads offline.
Can I watch downloads on any device? Downloads are stored on the device they were downloaded on, but can be viewed from any profile on that device.
Do Netflix downloads expire? Yes, downloads may expire after a certain period and some titles have yearly download limits.
Can Kids profiles watch all downloaded Netflix content? No, some downloaded titles with higher maturity ratings may not be available on Kids profiles.
How can I free up space from Netflix downloads? You can delete downloaded titles from your device after watching them to free up storage.
What is Smart Downloads on Netflix? Smart Downloads is a feature that automatically downloads TV shows and movies to your device for offline viewing.
How does Smart Downloads work on Netflix? Smart Downloads automatically manages downloads using two features: Download Next Episode and Downloads for You.
What is Download Next Episode on Netflix? Download Next Episode automatically deletes watched episodes and downloads the next episode in a TV series for you.
What is Downloads for You on Netflix? Downloads for You automatically downloads recommended TV shows and movies based on your viewing preferences.
Can I turn Smart Downloads on or off? Yes, Smart Downloads features like Download Next Episode and Downloads for You can be turned on or off in your Netflix app settings.
Is Smart Downloads available on all Netflix plans? No, Smart Downloads is not available on ad-supported Netflix plans.
What happens when I finish watching a downloaded episode with Smart Downloads? The episode is automatically deleted and the next episode is downloaded if Download Next Episode is enabled.
How does Netflix choose content for Downloads for You? Netflix selects titles based on your viewing habits and recommendations it thinks you will enjoy.
Do Smart Downloads use mobile data? Smart Downloads can use data if not connected to Wi-Fi, but it is recommended to use Wi-Fi to avoid data usage.
Can Smart Downloads fill up my device storage? Yes, but Netflix manages storage by deleting watched content and replacing it with new downloads automatically.

What is Download Next Episode on Netflix? Download Next Episode is a Smart Downloads feature that automatically downloads the next episode of a TV series after you finish watching a downloaded episode.
How does Download Next Episode work on Netflix? After you watch a downloaded episode, Netflix deletes it from your device and automatically downloads the next episode in the series.
Does Netflix delete the last episode with Download Next Episode? No, the final episode of a series is not automatically deleted after you watch it.
Is Download Next Episode available on all Netflix plans? No, it is not available on ad-supported Netflix plans.
How do I turn on Download Next Episode on Netflix? Open the Netflix app, go to My Netflix, open the menu, tap App Settings, select Smart Downloads, and toggle Download Next Episode on.
How do I turn off Download Next Episode on Netflix? Go to My Netflix, open the menu, tap App Settings, go to Smart Downloads, and toggle Download Next Episode off.
Which devices support Download Next Episode? It is available on Android phones and tablets, iPhone, and iPad with the latest Netflix app.
Does Download Next Episode use mobile data? No, it works over Wi-Fi so it does not use mobile data.
Does Download Next Episode take extra storage space? No, it only uses the same storage as your existing downloads and replaces watched episodes.
What should I do if the next episode doesn't download on Netflix? Make sure the feature is turned on, connect to Wi-Fi, and check that the series has additional episodes available.
Why isn't Download Next Episode working on Netflix? It may be disabled, you may not be connected to Wi-Fi, or the show may not have additional episodes to download.
What is Downloads for You on Netflix? Downloads for You is a Smart Downloads feature that automatically downloads TV shows and movies you may like for offline viewing.
How does Downloads for You work on Netflix? It automatically downloads recommended TV shows and movies to your device so you always have content available offline.
Is Downloads for You available on all Netflix plans? No, it is not available on ad-supported Netflix plans.
How do I turn on Downloads for You on Netflix? Open the Netflix app, go to My Netflix, open the menu, tap App Settings, select Smart Downloads, and toggle Downloads for You on.
How do I turn off Downloads for You on Netflix? Go to My Netflix, open the menu, tap App Settings, go to Smart Downloads, and toggle Downloads for You off.
Can I control how much space Downloads for You uses? Yes, when enabled, you can adjust the storage amount (in GB) used for downloads per profile.
Which devices support Downloads for You? It is available on iPhone, iPad, and Android phones and tablets with the latest Netflix app installed.
Does Downloads for You use mobile data? No, it only downloads content when connected to Wi-Fi, so it does not use cellular data.
Can I turn Downloads for You on or off anytime? Yes, it is optional and can be enabled or disabled at any time in Smart Downloads settings.
Why are TV shows or movies not automatically downloading with Downloads for You? Make sure the feature is enabled, your device is on Wi-Fi, and there is enough storage space available.
What should I do if Downloads for You is not working? Check that it is turned on, confirm you are connected to Wi-Fi, and ensure your device has sufficient storage.
How do I change the video quality of Netflix downloads? You can change download video quality in the Netflix app settings under App Settings by selecting either Standard or High/Higher quality.

What are the Netflix download video quality options? Netflix offers Standard quality (lower storage, faster downloads, SD resolution) and High/Higher quality (more storage, slower downloads, up to 1080p HD).
What is Standard download quality on Netflix? Standard quality downloads use less storage space, download faster, and play in standard definition (SD).
What is High or Higher download quality on Netflix? High or Higher quality downloads use more storage space, take longer to download, and can play in up to 1080p HD depending on device and title.

How do I change Netflix download quality on iPhone or Android? Open the Netflix app, go to My Netflix, open the Menu, tap App Settings, then select Download Video Quality or Video Quality and choose Standard or High/Higher.
Why can't I see HD download quality on Netflix? Some devices do not support HD playback, and some titles are not available in HD.
Does download quality affect storage space on Netflix? Yes, higher quality downloads use significantly more storage than standard quality.
Does download quality affect download speed on Netflix? Yes, Standard downloads are faster, while High/Higher quality downloads take longer.
Can all Netflix content be downloaded in HD? No, only supported devices and certain titles are available in HD quality downloads.

How do I store Netflix downloads on an SD card? You can store Netflix downloads on an SD card by changing the Download Location in the Netflix app settings on supported Android or Amazon Fire devices.
Which devices support storing Netflix downloads on an SD card? SD card storage for Netflix downloads is available on Android phones and tablets and Amazon Fire devices with an installed SD card.
How do I change Netflix download storage to an SD card? Open the Netflix app, go to My Netflix, open the Menu, tap App Settings, then select Download Location and choose the SD card.
Will changing Netflix download location move existing downloads? No, changing the download location only affects future downloads. Existing downloads stay in their current location.
Can I choose where Netflix saves downloads? Yes, you can choose between device storage and an SD card (if supported) in the Download Location settings.
Where is the Download Location setting in Netflix? It is located in the Netflix app under My Netflix > Menu > App Settings > Downloads.
Do all Netflix downloads go to the SD card after changing settings? No, only new downloads will be saved to the SD card after you change the setting.
Can I use an SD card for Netflix downloads on iPhone or iPad? No, SD card storage for downloads is not available on iOS devices.
Why can't I see the SD card option in Netflix? The option may not appear if your device does not support SD cards or if no SD card is installed.

What should I do if I can’t download a TV show or movie on Netflix? If you can’t download Netflix content, check for error messages, confirm the title is downloadable, and troubleshoot your device or app settings.
Why can’t I download some Netflix titles? Some titles are not available for download due to licensing restrictions, so the download icon may not appear.
Why is the download icon missing on Netflix? If the download icon is missing, the title is not available for offline viewing on your account or region.
What should I do if I see a Netflix download error message? Search the Netflix Help Center for the exact error code or message to find specific troubleshooting steps.
Why can I download some Netflix shows but not others? This usually means only certain titles are available for download due to licensing limitations.
How do I fix Netflix downloads not working on Android? Make sure your device and Netflix app are updated, restart the app, and check OS compatibility.
How do I update Netflix on Android for downloads? Open the Play Store, find Netflix, and tap Update if available.
How do I update my Android OS for Netflix downloads? Use your device Settings to update the Android operating system to the latest version.
How do I fix Netflix download issues on Android using app data reset? You can clear Netflix app storage, but this will delete downloads and sign you out.
Why is storage permission needed for Netflix downloads on Android? Storage permission allows Netflix to save downloaded content on your device.
How do I fix Netflix downloads not working on iPhone or iPad? Update the Netflix app, update iOS, or reinstall the app if needed.
Does reinstalling Netflix fix download problems on iPhone? Yes, reinstalling can fix issues but will delete downloads and sign you out.
Why can’t I download Netflix on a Fire tablet? Your device may need Fire OS 7 or later or an updated Netflix app.
How do I update Netflix on an Amazon Fire tablet? Use the Amazon Appstore, go to App Updates, and install the latest Netflix update.
How do I update Fire OS for Netflix downloads? Go to Settings > Device Options > System Updates and install any available updates.
Why can’t I download Netflix on Windows? Netflix downloads are not supported on Windows devices.
Which devices support Netflix downloads? Downloads are supported on Android, iPhone, iPad, Amazon Fire tablets, and Chromebooks with the Google Play Store.
Why isn’t a Netflix movie or TV show available for download? Some titles cannot be downloaded due to content licensing restrictions or provider limitations.

Why are some Netflix titles not available for download? Titles may be unavailable for download due to exclusive rights held by other companies, licensing restrictions, or cost and regional availability factors.
Why can’t I download certain Netflix shows? Some shows cannot be downloaded because Netflix does not have download rights for all licensed content.
Why are some Netflix movies not downloadable? Movies may not be available for download due to content provider restrictions or licensing agreements.
Are all Netflix titles available for download? No, Netflix tries to make most titles downloadable, but some are restricted based on licensing and distribution agreements.

Why are Netflix original shows sometimes not available for download? Some Netflix originals are co-produced with studios that hold certain rights, which may prevent download availability even if streaming is allowed.
Can Netflix originals be unavailable for download? Yes, even some Netflix originals may not be downloadable due to shared ownership or licensing agreements.
What factors affect whether a Netflix title can be downloaded? Availability depends on licensing rights, exclusivity agreements, popularity, cost, and regional restrictions.
Which devices support Netflix downloads? Downloads are supported on Android, iPhone, iPad, Amazon Chromebook, and Amazon Fire apps.
Why does Netflix restrict downloads on some content? Restrictions exist because Netflix may only have streaming rights, not offline download rights, for certain titles.
What does 'Expired' mean on a Netflix download? 'Expired' means the downloaded TV show or movie has reached its time limit and can no longer be watched offline until it is renewed or re-downloaded.
Why do Netflix downloads expire? Netflix downloads expire after a certain period of time, and you can watch them as many times as you want before they expire.
Can I watch expired Netflix downloads? No, once a download expires, you must renew or download it again to continue watching.
How do I renew an expired Netflix download on Android? Delete the expired download from the Downloads section and then download the title again from its page.
How do I delete and re-download a Netflix title on Android? Go to Downloads, select the title, tap the download status icon, choose Delete Download, then re-download the title.
How do I fix an expired Netflix download on iPhone or iPad? Check your device date and time settings, delete the expired download, and then download the title again.
How do I check date and time settings on iPhone for Netflix downloads? Go to Settings > General > Date & Time and ensure Set Automatically is turned on or adjust the time manually.
How do I renew an expired Netflix download on iPhone or iPad? Delete the download from the Downloads section and re-download the title after confirming correct date and time settings.
How do I fix expired Netflix downloads on a Fire tablet? Delete the expired download from Downloads and re-download the title from its page in the Netflix app.
Can all expired Netflix downloads be renewed? No, titles that are no longer available on Netflix cannot be renewed or downloaded again.
Why can’t I re-download an expired Netflix title? If the title is no longer available on Netflix, it cannot be re-downloaded even if it previously expired.
What happens if I try to watch an expired Netflix download? You will be unable to play it until you delete and re-download it if it is still available on Netflix.
What does 'Expired' mean on a Netflix download? It means the downloaded TV show or movie has reached its expiration period and can no longer be played until it is renewed or downloaded again.
Why do Netflix downloads expire? Downloads expire after a set period of time, but you can watch them as many times as you want before they expire.
Can I still watch an expired Netflix download? No, once a download is expired you must renew it or download it again if it is still available on Netflix.
How do I renew an expired Netflix download on Android? Open Downloads, select the title, tap the download status icon, choose Delete Download, then re-download the title.
How do I fix expired Netflix downloads on Android phones or tablets? Delete the expired download and then download the title again from its page in the Netflix app.
How do I fix expired Netflix downloads on iPhone or iPad? Check your device date and time settings, then delete the download and re-download the title if needed.
What should I do if my Netflix download says expired on iPhone or iPad? Ensure date and time settings are correct, delete the download, and re-download the title from Netflix.
How do I fix expired Netflix downloads on a Fire tablet? Delete the expired download from the Downloads section and then re-download the title.
Can all expired Netflix downloads be renewed? No, titles that are no longer available on Netflix cannot be renewed or re-downloaded.
Why can’t I re-download an expired Netflix title? If the title has been removed from Netflix, it is no longer available for download or streaming.
What should I do if my Netflix download won’t play because it expired? Delete the expired file and re-download it if the title is still available in the Netflix catalog.
How do I delete Netflix downloads? You can delete Netflix downloads from the Downloads section in the app by selecting a title and tapping Delete Download.
How do I delete a single Netflix movie or episode? Go to Downloads, tap the download status icon next to the title, and select Delete Download.
How do I delete individual episodes of a Netflix show? Open the TV show in Downloads, select the episode, tap the download status icon, and choose Delete Download.
How do I delete all Netflix downloads on my phone or tablet? Go to My Netflix > Menu > App Settings > Downloads and select Delete All Downloads, then confirm.
How do I remove all Netflix downloads from a device? You can remove the device from your account using the Manage download devices page, which deletes all downloads on that device.
How do I remove Netflix downloads using a web browser? Go to your Manage download devices page, sign in if needed, and select Remove device.
How do I remove Netflix downloads on Android or iPhone via account settings? Go to My Netflix > Menu > Account > Manage download devices, then tap Remove device.
What happens when I delete Netflix downloads? The downloaded TV shows and movies are removed from your device and must be re-downloaded to watch offline again.
Does deleting Netflix downloads free up storage? Yes, deleting downloads frees up storage space on your device.
Can I delete Netflix downloads from another device? Yes, you can remove a device from your Netflix account to delete all downloads on that device.
What is Download Next Episode on Netflix downloads? It automatically deletes watched episodes and downloads the next episode in a series.
Can I recover deleted Netflix downloads? No, deleted downloads must be re-downloaded from Netflix if the title is still available.
How do I create a kids profile on Netflix? Go to Manage Profiles, select Add Profile, enter a name, and enable the Kids or For Kids option before saving.
How do I add a Netflix profile for a child on a TV? From the profile selection screen, choose Add Profile and select the Kids option if available.
How do I create a kids profile on Netflix mobile app? In the Netflix app, tap My Netflix, select your profile, go to Manage Profiles, then choose Add Profile and enable Kids mode.
How do I create a kids profile on Netflix using a web browser? Go to the Manage Profiles page, click Add Profile, enter a name, and select the Kids option before continuing.
What is a Netflix Kids profile? A Kids profile is a Netflix profile with restricted maturity settings designed for children, showing only age-appropriate content.
How do I know if a Netflix profile is a kids profile? Kids profiles display a Kids logo on the profile icon to make them easy to identify.
Can I customize what kids can watch on Netflix? Yes, you can manage maturity ratings by creating a kids profile or adjusting profile settings.
Why can't I create a Netflix profile on my device? Some older devices or browsers may not support profile creation, and you may need to use a computer or updated app.
Where do I manage Netflix profiles? You can manage profiles on TV devices, the mobile app under My Netflix, or on the Manage Profiles page in a web browser.
Can I create multiple profiles on Netflix? Yes, Netflix allows multiple profiles per account, including individual kids profiles with restricted content.
How do I create a Netflix profile? Go to Manage Profiles, select Add Profile, enter a name, and choose Kids if needed, then save the profile.
How do I create a kids profile on Netflix? In Manage Profiles, select Add Profile, enter a name, and enable the Kids option before continuing.
How do I edit a Netflix profile? Go to Manage Profiles, select a profile, click the Edit icon, change settings like name, language, or maturity level, and save changes.
How do I delete a Netflix profile? Go to Manage Profiles, select the profile, click Edit, then choose Delete Profile to remove it.
Can I delete the main Netflix profile? No, the main profile on a Netflix account cannot be deleted.
How many profiles can I have on Netflix? A Netflix account can have up to 5 profiles.
What happens when I delete a Netflix profile? Deleting a profile removes its viewing history, preferences, and game saves permanently.
How do I manage Netflix profiles on mobile? Open the app, go to My Netflix, tap Menu, then Manage Profiles to edit or delete profiles.
How do I manage Netflix profiles on a TV? Go to the profile selection screen and choose Add Profile or edit an existing profile.
How do I manage Netflix profiles in a web browser? Go to the Manage Profiles page or Account > Profiles section to create, edit, or delete profiles.
What settings can be customized in a Netflix profile? Profiles can have personalized language, maturity ratings, subtitles, playback settings, notifications, and viewing history.
Can I set parental controls on Netflix profiles? Yes, you can set maturity limits, viewing restrictions, and profile locks with a PIN for parental control.
How do I add or change a profile email on Netflix? Go to Account > Profiles in a browser, select a profile, and add or edit its email address.
Do Netflix profiles have separate recommendations? Yes, each profile has its own personalized recommendations, My List, and viewing activity.
Can Kids profiles access all Netflix features? No, some features like certain settings and controls are limited or unavailable in Kids profiles.
How do I control Netflix data usage? You can change playback settings in your account or app settings to adjust video quality and limit how much data Netflix uses.
How do I change Netflix data usage in a web browser? Go to Account > Profiles > Playback settings and select a data usage level such as Low, Medium, High, or Auto.
What are Netflix data usage settings on web? Netflix offers Low (0.3 GB/hr), Medium (0.7 GB/hr), High (up to 7 GB/hr depending on quality), and Auto which adjusts to your internet speed.
How do I reduce Netflix data usage? Select Low or Medium playback settings in your account or enable lower data usage in the mobile app settings.
How do I change Netflix mobile data usage settings? In the Netflix app, go to My Netflix > Menu > App Settings > Cellular Data Usage and choose a data option.
What are Netflix mobile data usage options? Mobile options include Automatic, Wi-Fi Only, Save Data, and Maximum Data depending on your preferred quality and data usage.
What does Netflix Automatic data usage mean? Automatic mode adjusts streaming quality based on your internet speed to balance data usage and video quality.
What is Netflix Save Data mode? Save Data mode reduces usage to about 6 hours per GB of data for mobile streaming.
What is Netflix Maximum Data mode? Maximum Data uses the highest possible video quality and can consume about 1 GB per 20 minutes or more.
Can I limit Netflix to Wi-Fi only? Yes, you can enable Wi-Fi Only in mobile app settings to prevent streaming on cellular data.
Can I set different Netflix data usage per profile? Yes, each Netflix profile can have its own playback data usage settings.
Does lowering Netflix data usage affect video quality? Yes, restricting data usage may reduce streaming quality.
Why can't I change Netflix data usage settings? You may need to disable Automatic mode or wait for downloads to finish before changing settings.
Do Netflix downloads affect data usage settings? Yes, pending downloads or settings may prevent changes to mobile data usage options.
How much data does Netflix use per hour? It ranges from 0.3 GB to 7 GB per hour depending on the selected video quality.

How do I transfer a profile to an extra member account? When you buy an extra member slot, you can transfer an existing profile to the extra member so they can keep their recommendations, viewing history, My List, saved games, and settings.

Can I transfer a profile if there is only 1 profile or if the extra member had their own account? If there is only 1 profile on your account, or if the extra member previously had their own account, you will not be able to transfer a profile.

How do I choose which profile to transfer to the extra member? To transfer a profile, follow the steps to add an extra member, and when asked which profile to use, choose one of the existing profiles.
Are there any profiles that can't be transferred to an extra member account? Note: Kid's profiles, PIN-protected profiles, and the main profile cannot be transferred.

What happens after I transfer a profile to an extra member? After the profile is transferred, the extra member can choose to accept it or create a new profile. If accepted, the profile will be removed from the primary account.

How do I link my Netflix account with extra members to a partner package? You can link your Netflix account with extra members to a partner package, but only if your provider allows it. Check the Help Center for specific information about your package.

Will extra member slots be affected if I change to a partner package? If your package provider allows extra members, the slots will not be affected as long as the Netflix plan supports the same number of extra members. If the provider doesn’t allow extra members, they will be canceled immediately.
How often can I change my extra member? You can change your extra member up to 2 times per month. The current extra member will lose access immediately, but can be re-added to an available slot.
How do I change my extra member? To change an extra member, go to netflix.com/account/membership/extra-members and select 'Remove recipient.' You will also receive email confirmation of the change.

How do I switch an extra member from ads to ad-free or vice versa? If you want to switch an extra member (with ads) to an ad-free member, or vice versa, you need to cancel the current slot and add a new one. You may need to wait until the next month to make this change.

Can I cancel an extra member slot at any time? You can cancel an extra member slot at any time. The extra member can continue watching until the end of the current billing period. Re-adding them is possible or they can sign up for their own account.

How do I cancel an extra member slot? To cancel an extra member slot, go to netflix.com/account/membership/extra-members and select 'Cancel slot.' You’ll receive confirmation once the action is completed.
Can I restart a canceled extra member slot? If you canceled an extra member slot and your billing period hasn't ended, you can restart the slot if you have a Standard or Premium plan.

How do I restart a canceled extra member slot? To restart an extra member slot, go to netflix.com/account/membership/extra-members and select 'Restart.' You’ll receive confirmation after the restart is complete.

What happens if I cancel my primary account? If the primary account is canceled, any extra member slots will also be canceled, as extra members can only be added to existing Standard or Premium plans.

How do I transfer a profile to an extra member account? When you buy an extra member slot, you can transfer an existing profile to the extra member so they can keep their recommendations, viewing history, My List, saved games, and settings.

Can I transfer a profile if there's only 1 profile on my account or if the extra member had their own account? If there is only 1 profile on your account, or if the extra member previously had their own account, you will not be able to transfer a profile.

How do I select which profile to transfer to the extra member? To transfer a profile, follow the steps to add an extra member, and when asked which profile to use, choose one of the existing profiles.
Are there any profiles I can't transfer to an extra member account? Note: Kid's profiles, PIN-protected profiles, and the main profile cannot be transferred.

What happens after I transfer a profile to an extra member? After the profile is transferred, the extra member can choose to accept it or create a new profile. If accepted, the profile will be removed from the primary account.

How do I link my Netflix account with extra members to a partner package? You can link your Netflix account with extra members to a partner package, but only if your provider allows it. Check the Help Center for specific information about your package.

Will extra member slots be affected if I change to a partner package? If your package provider allows extra members, the slots will not be affected as long as the Netflix plan supports the same number of extra members. If the provider doesn’t allow extra members, they will be canceled immediately.
Can I change my extra member? You can change your extra member up to 2 times per month. The current extra member will lose access immediately, but can be re-added to an available slot.
How do I change my extra member? To change an extra member, go to netflix.com/account/membership/extra-members and select 'Remove recipient.' You will also receive email confirmation of the change.

How do I switch an extra member from ads to ad-free or vice versa? If you want to switch an extra member (with ads) to an ad-free member, or vice versa, you need to cancel the current slot and add a new one. You may need to wait until the next month to make this change.

How do I cancel an extra member slot? You can cancel an extra member slot at any time. The extra member can continue watching until the end of the current billing period. Re-adding them is possible or they can sign up for their own account.

How do I cancel an extra member slot? To cancel an extra member slot, go to netflix.com/account/membership/extra-members and select 'Cancel slot.' You’ll receive confirmation once the action is completed.
Can I restart a canceled extra member slot? If you canceled an extra member slot and your billing period hasn't ended, you can restart the slot if you have a Standard or Premium plan.

How do I restart a canceled extra member slot? To restart an extra member slot, go to netflix.com/account/membership/extra-members and select 'Restart.' You’ll receive confirmation after the restart is complete.

What happens if I cancel my primary account? If the primary account is canceled, any extra member slots will also be canceled, as extra members can only be added to existing Standard or Premium plans.

What is spatial audio on Netflix? Spatial audio enhances sound without the need for surround sound speakers or home theater equipment and is available on the Netflix Premium plan. It works on all Netflix-supported devices.

How can I find TV shows and movies with spatial audio? To find TV shows and movies with spatial audio, search for 'spatial audio' in the Netflix app. You'll see a spatial audio label next to the title's description.

How do I watch Netflix with spatial audio? TV shows and movies that support spatial audio will automatically play when spatial audio is turned on. You'll need: The Netflix Premium plan and any Netflix-supported device. Note: TVs or soundbars that use 5.1 surround sound or Dolby Atmos may require switching to a stereo output to enable spatial audio. Check your manufacturer’s settings for compatibility.
What do I need to watch Netflix with spatial audio and head tracking? You'll need: The Netflix Premium plan, a compatible device, and compatible earbuds or headset.
How do I enable head tracking for AirPods or Beats with an iPhone, iPad, or Apple TV? Go to Apple's support site for the list of compatible devices and steps to turn on head tracking.
How do I enable head tracking for Pixel Buds Pro with a Google Pixel phone? Go to Google's support site for the list of compatible devices and steps to turn on head tracking.

How do I enable head tracking for Galaxy Buds with a Samsung Galaxy phone? The following Galaxy Buds models work with Galaxy phones and get Netflix spatial audio with head tracking: Galaxy Buds Pro, Galaxy Buds2 Pro, Galaxy Buds3 Pro, Galaxy Buds4 or Buds4 Pro. To turn on head tracking: Connect your earbuds to your phone, open the Galaxy Wearable app, tap Earbud Settings > Advanced, and for Buds2 Pro, tap 360 audio. Then, tap the switch to turn on 360 audio and head tracking.

How do I change my Netflix plan? You can change your Netflix plan by following these steps: Go to the Change Plan page in a browser. You may need to sign in if you haven't already. Choose the plan you'd like, then select Continue or Update. If you don't have the option to change your plan, see 'Can't change plan' below. Tap or click Confirm Change or Confirm.

When will changes to a higher-priced plan take effect? Changing to a higher-priced plan takes effect immediately so you can enjoy all of the added features. Your billing date may change based on the remaining balance of your last payment, or you may be charged a prorated amount for the balance.

When will changes to a lower-priced plan take effect? Changing to a lower-priced plan takes effect on your next billing date. You can continue to use the features of the higher-priced plan until then.

What should I do if I can’t change my Netflix plan? If you aren’t able to change your plan, it could be for a number of reasons: Your account is on hold, your account is paused, or a Kids profile is active when you go to the Change Plan page. See 'How to switch profiles' to change to a different one.

What if I can’t change my plan because I pay through a partner? If you pay for Netflix through a partner or get Netflix as part of a package, you may not have the option to change your plan. Check our Help Center for your partner's plan change eligibility and timing.

What is profile transfer on Netflix? Profile transfer enables the Netflix member and people using the member’s account to transfer a profile to a new account, an existing account, or an extra member slot – including the recommendations, viewing history, My List, game saves, settings, and more.

What are the requirements for transferring a profile? A profile can be transferred as long as it is on an active account, isn't a Kids profile, isn't PIN-protected (if it has a PIN, remove it first), doesn't have a profile email address attached to it, and isn't a profile in an Extra Member account.

How do I turn profile transfers on or off? To transfer a profile from an account, you first need to turn on profile transfers. You can do this from the 'Do you want to allow profile transfers?' page in your account settings.

How do I turn on profile transfers? Go to the 'Do you want to allow profile transfers?' page, sign in if needed, and choose Allow. You’ll receive a confirmation email and can choose Enable Instantly, or the transfer option will be available automatically in two days.

How do I turn on profile transfers when inviting an extra member? Sign in to your account, go to your Account page, and choose Manage extra member. When adding an extra member, select Allow Profile Transfers and follow the steps. You’ll receive a confirmation email and can enable instantly.

How do I turn off profile transfers? Go to the 'Turn off profile transfers' page in your account settings and click or tap Turn Off Profile Transfer. Note that turning off profile transfers doesn’t affect profiles already transferred.

How do I start a new account with a profile transfer? Sign in to the account with the profile you want to transfer. Visit the Account page, select Profiles, choose the profile, and start Profile Transfer. Choose 'A New Account', enter the new account details, and complete the setup.

How do I transfer a profile to an existing account? Sign in to the account with the profile to transfer. Visit the Account page, select Profiles, choose the profile, and start Profile Transfer. Select 'An Existing Account', enter the email and password for the existing account, and confirm the transfer.

Can I transfer a profile to an extra member? Yes, when purchasing an extra member slot, account owners can transfer a profile to the extra member. This includes the profile’s recommendations, viewing history, My List, and more, but primary profiles cannot be transferred.

What information is transferred during a profile transfer? When transferring a profile to a new or existing account, the following is copied: profile name, recommendations, viewing history, My List, game saves, settings, and more. For extra members, the profile will be moved and removed from the original account.

Can I delete a transferred profile? Yes, after transferring a profile to a new or existing account, you can delete the original profile in the Manage profiles screen, as long as it isn’t the primary profile.

Can I transfer a profile to an account paid through a partner package? Yes, but if the transferred profile is to be the main profile, you'll need to add another payment method during the transfer process. For third-party billing, you must use a different payment method during the transfer.
Can I duplicate a profile within the same account? No, this feature cannot be used to duplicate a profile within the same account.

How do I finish an incomplete profile transfer? If you started a profile transfer to create a new account, you can finish the process by logging into Netflix using the email and password used for the transfer and selecting Finish Transfer.
How do I cancel my account? See How to cancel Netflix.
How do I update my account information? See How to update Netflix account information.
What should I do if I’m seeing charges from Netflix that I did not authorize? See Unrecognized or unauthorized charges from Netflix.
I have a billing-related question. Where can I find help? For common billing questions, visit Billing and Payments. For specific questions around charges on your account, please contact us.

How do I remove someone who is using my account without my permission? See How to stop someone from using your account. You may also wish to review our recommendations for keeping your Netflix account and personal information safe.
How do I hide titles from my viewing history? See How to hide titles from viewing history.

How does Netflix share my personal information? We use the personal information we collect to provide, maintain, improve, and promote the Netflix service, and to communicate with you. We share personal information for limited purposes as explained in our Privacy Statement.

How do I unsubscribe from Netflix emails? We offer you the opportunity to opt-out of marketing and certain other Netflix emails, including surveys. For instructions on how to opt-out, see How to manage email from Netflix.

Where do I send a fake email I received? See Phishing or suspicious emails or texts claiming to be from Netflix. You may also wish to review our recommendations for keeping your Netflix account and personal information safe.

I couldn’t find what I was looking for. Where can I get more information? If you did not find answers to your privacy questions, see our Privacy and Security help page for more topics. You can also visit our Privacy Statement at netflix.com/privacy. If you have any other questions, please contact us.
How do I update my Netflix account information? If you want to update your Netflix account information, follow the steps below.

How do I change my email address on Netflix? To change the email address you use to sign in to Netflix, go to the Change Email page. You may need to sign in if you haven’t already. If a Kids profile is active, change to another profile first and then try again.

What do I do if I can’t remember the email address I use for Netflix? If you forgot the email address you use for your account, go to our Update password, email or phone page, tap or click I don't remember my email or phone, then follow the steps.
How do I change my payment method on Netflix? See How to add or update a payment method.

How do I change my password on Netflix? If you know your password and can sign in to Netflix but want to change it, go to the Change password page. You can’t change your password if a Kids profile is active. Change to another profile first and then change the password.

What should my Netflix password be like? When choosing a password, it should be: Different than what you use for any other websites or apps, at least 8 characters long, a mix of uppercase and lowercase letters, numbers, and symbols, and not easily guessed (e.g., 'password', '12345678').

How do I add or change my phone number on Netflix? To add, change or delete a phone number, go to the Mobile phone page. You may need to sign in if you haven’t already. After confirming your identity, you can add, change, or delete your phone number.

How do I delete my phone number from my Netflix account? To delete your phone number, go to the Mobile phone page and choose Delete Phone Number. You will need to confirm it’s valid by entering the code we sent to your phone in a text message when you changed it.
How can I recover my account if I forget my password? If you can't sign in or can’t remember your password, see How to change or reset your password.
How do I manage profiles on Netflix? See How to create, change, or delete profiles.
How do I add or update my payment method on Netflix? To add or update your payment method for Netflix, follow the steps based on how you pay for Netflix.

How do I update my payment method on Netflix if I'm billed by Netflix? Go to the Manage payment info page (payment methods cannot be managed within the Netflix app, unless the app was downloaded from the Samsung Galaxy store). Select the Update button next to the payment method you want to update, or select + Add Payment Method to add a new payment method.

Can I have more than one payment method on Netflix? This feature is not available in all countries. The Preferred badge will display next to your default payment method for Netflix. If you have redeemed a Netflix gift card, the gift card balance will be consumed first before the Preferred payment method is charged. Any additional payment methods on your account will be used as backup payment methods and will only be charged if your Preferred payment method is declined.

How do I change my preferred payment method on Netflix? To change your Preferred payment method, select the three dots to the right of the Update button on the payment method you want to make Preferred. Then select Make Preferred.
How do I remove a payment method on Netflix? To remove a payment method, select the three dots to the right of the Update button on the payment method you want to remove, then select Remove.

What do I do if I am billed through a partner package? If you are billed through a partner package, you may need to add a secondary payment method to make additional purchases, such as extra members. If you want to add a secondary payment method without making a purchase, go to your Account page and select Add Payment Method.

How do I update or change my secondary payment method? To update or change your secondary payment method, go to the Manage payment info page and select the Update button next to the payment method you want to update, or select + Add Payment Method to add a new payment method.

How do I remove a payment method from my Netflix account? To remove a payment method from your account, go to the Manage payment info page and delete the payment method you want to remove. You may need to sign in if you haven’t already.

Can I remove the only payment method on my Netflix account? If you only have one payment method on file, you can't remove it without adding a new payment method first. When a payment method is removed from your account, Netflix will no longer be able to charge that payment method unless it is re-added to your Netflix account.

What if I want to remove a backup payment method if I have Netflix through a partner package? If you have Netflix through a partner package and wish to remove a backup payment method, contact us for help.

Can Netflix Customer Service remove a specific payment method from my account? Customer Service is unable to remove a specific payment method from your account. However, we can remove all payment methods as long as you are not paying through a partner or with a gift card. Once removed, you can add a new payment method to your account before your current billing period ends if you want to continue using Netflix.
Are there any payment methods I cannot remove from my account? Some third-party payment methods cannot be removed from accounts.
How do I contact Netflix about data deletion or retention? If you have questions about data deletion or retention, contact privacy@netflix.com.
